title: andropogon carinatus var. genuinus
intro: Andropogon carinatus var. genuinus, also known as Broomsedge, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Broomsedge include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Broomsedge can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
